rule: Operating decisions derive authority coverage from this versioned contract surface; runtime code loads this registry and must not maintain a parallel Python-only owner table.

surfaces.activation: durable shaping input, not active task state
surfaces.editable_by: system-intent sync and explicit repo edits
surfaces.stale_when: mirror revision differs from source declaration
surfaces.proof_route: system-intent sync and contract tooling checks

surfaces.activation: active TODO item, selected owner, or current lane slice
surfaces.stale_when: planning revision or selected owner revision changes
surfaces.proof_route: planning package tests and lane health checks

surfaces.stale_when: manifest route no longer selects or finding is superseded
surfaces.disposition: retain as routed evidence, not current-task authority

surfaces.activation: selected target, context, allowed effects, and transport policy
surfaces.editable_by: target evidence and assignment policy operations
surfaces.stale_when: target identity, assignment revision, or transport policy changes

surfaces.activation: fresh bound result for the current definition revision
surfaces.stale_when: definition revision or bound result identity changes
surfaces.disposition: retain as longitudinal authority when registered

surfaces.activation: selected proof subject for current changed paths
surfaces.editable_by: proof receipt admission and verification operations
surfaces.stale_when: proof subject, selected command, or changed-path fingerprint changes
surfaces.proof_route: proof report and receipt reconciliation tests

surfaces.activation: current head/scope/target baseline before mutation or admission
surfaces.stale_when: head, scope, target, or managed state changes

surfaces.activation: valid executor binding for current owner/target/assignment/proof state
task-routed skill viability and dependency checks
surfaces.editable_by: skill registry and installed skill metadata
surfaces.stale_when: skill registry, dependency status, or routed task shape changes
surfaces.proof_route: skill registry and workspace startup tests

surfaces.activation: target identity, guidance overlay, and execution posture selection
surfaces.editable_by: target evidence and guidance identity operations
surfaces.stale_when: target identity, guidance overlay, or execution posture changes
surfaces.proof_route: target guidance identity and assignment tests

surfaces.activation: terminal outcome contract, custody, and final-response admission state
surfaces.stale_when: terminal outcome, custody, or continuation state changes
surfaces.disposition: retain as final-claim and continuation authority

surfaces.activation: generated freshness and operation registry selection
surfaces.stale_when: source contract revision differs from generated projection
